findings.acli_clone_support: acli jira project create --from-project can clone only company-managed projects
findings.result: The current AIGO project cannot serve as the golden clone source because it is team-managed/next-gen, not company-managed.

required_to_complete: Create or identify a company-managed golden AIGO template project.
Set templateProjectKey in a disposable instance config.
Run readiness and compare clone mutations against fresh provisioning.
Archive/delete the disposable clone after evidence is captured.
